articles.title: Introducing o3 and o4-mini: OpenAI's Latest Reasoning Models
articles.description: OpenAI has introduced o3 and o4-mini, its newest reasoning models featuring improved multimodal understanding and a new architecture for complex multi-step problem solving across scientific and coding domains.

articles.title: European Parliament Passes AI Act: World's First Comprehensive AI Law
articles.description: The European Union's comprehensive AI Act enters enforcement, requiring high-risk AI systems to meet transparency and safety standards. Companies worldwide are adjusting to ensure compliance with the landmark regulation.

articles.title: AI Education Summit: The Future of AI in Schools Is Already Here
articles.description: Stanford HAI hosted an education summit examining how AI-powered tutoring systems are boosting student outcomes, though researchers caution about equitable access to the technology across income levels.

articles.title: AlphaFold: Five Years of Scientific Impact
articles.description: Google DeepMind reflects on five years of AlphaFold, which has identified hundreds of thousands of protein structures and accelerated drug discovery timelines from years to months for rare genetic diseases.

articles.title: Here Are the 49 US AI Startups That Have Raised $100M or More
articles.description: AI startups continue to attract massive investment. TechCrunch profiles the 49 US companies that have raised over $100 million, highlighting the surge in enterprise AI demand and safety research funding.

articles.title: Unpacking Large Language Model Bias in Healthcare AI
articles.description: MIT researchers found that widely-used AI diagnostic systems show significant accuracy gaps across racial and ethnic groups, renewing calls for mandatory bias auditing in medical AI applications.

articles.title: China Takes Confident Strides to Develop More AI Innovation in 2026
articles.description: China's government is accelerating AI development with national education programs and infrastructure investment, aiming to integrate AI literacy across K-12 and train millions of students in foundational AI skills.

articles.title: Microsoft Copilot Expands AI-Powered Productivity Across Applications
articles.description: Microsoft has expanded Copilot's AI capabilities across its application suite, including new templates designed for professional documentation, progress notes, and planning workflows.

articles.title: UK Government Proposes AI Watermarking Requirement for Generated Content
articles.description: The UK's Department for Science has proposed mandatory digital watermarks on all AI-generated text, images, and video, aiming to combat deepfakes and misinformation ahead of upcoming elections.

articles.title: DeepSeek R1: A Free, Open-Source AI Model That Reasons as Well as OpenAI's o1
articles.description: Open-source AI reaches a new milestone with DeepSeek R1, a model that benchmarks competitively with proprietary systems, potentially democratizing access to advanced AI for researchers and educators.

articles.title: Teachers Believe AI Is Here to Stay in Education — But How Should It Be Taught?
articles.description: Educators are increasingly leveraging AI tools to design assessments that accommodate diverse learning styles and reduce cultural bias in testing, but debate continues on the best approach.

articles.title: Humanoid Robots Are Coming Into Factories — And Everyday Life
articles.description: Japanese and global tech firms have unveiled a new generation of AI companion robots designed for eldercare and manufacturing, capable of emotional recognition, medication reminders, and health monitoring.

articles.title: Exploring the Ethics of AI Through Narrative and Social Impact
articles.description: Stanford HAI researchers examine the ethical implications of AI systems, including emotion recognition in hiring, urging governments to address discriminatory outcomes and unreliable applications.

articles.title: Google's 2025 AI Research Breakthroughs and What's Ahead
articles.description: Google has shared a comprehensive overview of its AI research milestones, including advances in language models, responsible AI, and tools designed to help educators integrate AI into their teaching practices.

articles.title: AI Startups Are Eating the Venture Industry — And the Returns Are Good
articles.description: AI-focused venture capital has surged to record levels, with startups across the globe attracting billions in funding as enterprise demand for AI tools and safety research accelerates.

articles.title: Improving AI Models' Ability to Explain Their Predictions
articles.description: MIT researchers have developed a new framework for making AI model predictions more interpretable, with applications in healthcare diagnostics and workplace burnout pattern detection.
